data.title: Lennox expands ecommerce tools to speed commercial HVAC sales
data.description: The moves reflect a broader push by manufacturers to pair logistics scale with digital sales tools as commercial buyers demand faster quotes, clearer inventory visibility, and quicker fulfillment.

data.title: Pacsun launches new ecommerce-enabled community app
data.description: Influencers who participate on Pacsun's PS Community App will be able to collect commissions for product recommendations.

data.title: Ikea tests new Roblox experience
data.description: Shoppers at some physical Ikea stores will be able to use QR code to acquire virtual items within the "Welcome to Bloxburg" experience on Roblox.

data.title: Saks Global files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy, receives permission to proceed with financing plan
data.description: The retailer has taken measures in an attempt to emerge from bankruptcy. In addition to what it has called "a transformative financial transaction," it has announced a leadership transition as part of its recovery process.

data.title: Coca-Cola to add a chief digital officer
data.description: The company said it is creating a chief digital officer position to consolidate responsibility for digital strategy, data and operational excellence across the enterprise.
